creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
An exp-run is needed too.

So far those 2 ports fail to strip their static libraries:

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR197395-default/2015-03-15_17h10m41s/logs/errors/libjpeg-turbo-1.3.1_5.log

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR197395-default/2015-03-15_17h10m41s/logs/errors/deadbeef-0.6.2_3.log
